summary: Comprehensive testing of The Doggy Bakery Admin Panel completed. All requested features verified working: Admin login (aditya/lola4304), Products tab with stats (Total: 393, Active: 393, No Image: 10, Categories: 15), Search functionality, Category filter, Edit modal with all fields (name, category, price, image, description, sizes, flavors), Save Changes button, Add New Product button, Cart persistence across pages, and Pet Soul tab in navbar with gradient styling.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint may not be implemented or has different path

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed
Console warning: Empty string passed to src attribute - some products may have empty image URLs

critical_code_review_comments: ProductManager.jsx correctly uses getAuthHeader() to fetch credentials from localStorage
Cart persistence implemented correctly using lazy initializer in CartContext.js - cart state initialized synchronously from localStorage
Pet Soul tab correctly added to Navbar.jsx with gradient styling (from-pink-500 to-purple-500)
Edit modal correctly displays all product fields including sizes and flavors with proper CRUD operations
Search and filter functionality working correctly with real-time filtering

success_rate.backend: 93% (15/16 tests passed - 2 health endpoint tests failed due to routing)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed products during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin panel features verified working. Backend APIs tested via pytest (15/16 passed). Frontend tested via Playwright. Cart persistence confirmed working across page navigation. Pet Soul tab visible in navbar with gradient styling. Product CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete) all working correctly.

admin_dashboard.details: Dashboard loads with stats: 7 total chats, 7 active chats, 2 custom requests

products_list.details: Products endpoint returns 393 products with proper structure

products_category_filter.details: Category filter correctly filters products (104 cakes found)

products_search.details: Search functionality filters products by name (187 products matching 'cake')

product_create.details: Create product API and UI both working correctly

product_update.details: Update product API and Save Changes button working correctly

edit_modal_fields.details: Edit modal shows all fields: name, category, price, image, description, sizes, flavors

product_stats.details: Stats cards show: Total=393, Active=393, No Image=10, Categories=15

cart_persistence.details: Cart items persist when navigating between pages (Cakes -> Pan India -> Home)

pet_soul_tab.details: Pet Soul tab visible in navbar with gradient styling, navigates to /my-pets

grid_list_view_toggle.details: Grid/List view toggle buttons present and functional
